span.p:
App name & description
in the Makefile

span.p:
3DS homebrew toolbox
compiler, libctru, build tools

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
make
reads Makefile and builds everything

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
div.span:
1. Compile
turn each .c file into machine code

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
div.span:
2. Link
combine code + libctru into one program

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
div.span:
3. Make metadata
title, author, icon for the launcher

span.p:
.elf — the program
for testing on an emulator or dev setup

span.p:
.smdh — launcher info
